title: Svetasvatara Upanishad III: The One God
description: From the Svetasvatara Upanishad III — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Svetasvatara Upanishad III — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: He who is the one in the midst of the many, who fulfills the desires of those who desire, who knows the cause that is to be known — knowing him, one becomes immortal.
